name: Rock Creek Sports Complex
description: Rock Creek Sports Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dawsonville, GA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Veterans Memorial Park
